notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons flow and wording remain from CC7.5.10.
Gift flow is now stable: channel -> post -> gift title -> gift content -> access mode -> review/save.
Gift step 4 wording no longer says unclear action; user sees gift content: link, photo, file, or text.
After gift content is sent, bot must open step 5/6 access mode, not jump to main menu and not show premature 6/6.
Gift settings are applied only after final Save.
Gift claim sends saved MAX attachment/link/text to user chat when possible.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
